---
title: "Getting an Overview of UAV Application in Science"
id: assessment
order: 40
summary: "Read selected UAV application articles, identify key insights and topics of interest, and prepare a short review."
modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
materials:
  - material-1
  - material-2
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-5
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
labels:
  - self-check
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/assessment.md"
---

## Task

- Read at least 2 of the articles in their entirety and the rest in a cursory manner.
- Name the top three insights that were most important to you.
- From the overview you have acquired, name the three topics of most interest to you.
- Select one article and prepare a short summary of 0.5 to 1 page using the [peer review template](https://plos.org/resource/peer-review-template/) of PLOS.
- Upload this summary to [Ilias](https://ilias.uni-marburg.de/).

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
